basics.name: Jay S
basics.headline: Product & Technology Leader | Technical Product Manager | Product Manager
basics.summary: Senior Product Manager with over five years of experience driving end-to-end technology roadmaps and optimizing customer experiences. Proven expertise in leading AI-powered product delivery and leveraging predictive analytics to accelerate hypothesis validation cycles. A data-driven leader based in Bangalore, skilled at navigating complex stakeholder environments to deliver strategic, high-impact retail solutions.

summary: Senior Product Manager with over five years of experience driving end-to-end technology roadmaps and optimizing customer experiences. Proven expertise in leading AI-powered product delivery and leveraging predictive analytics to accelerate hypothesis validation cycles. A data-driven leader based in Bangalore, skilled at navigating complex stakeholder environments to deliver strategic, high-impact retail solutions.

items.description:
Spearheaded the technical strategy, product execution, and modernization for a telecom AI suite, revitalizing a legacy portfolio. Client: Skyvera.

  • Legacy System Lifecycle Management: Formulated and executed a version deprecation strategy for an SMS center product suite, seamlessly migrating clients to a single, supported latest version while operating within existing SLAs and contract constraints, significantly reducing engineering load.
  • AI Feature Ideation & Strategy: Ideated and defined requirements for AI-focused capabilities. Conceptualized Kandy Notetaker (UCaaS integration for call transcription, diarization, and AI-driven insights/summaries) and Lithium Defender (LLM-based phishing detection layer for the SMS center).
  • AI-Native Product Launch: Architected and launched AI-native products (including Kandy Notetaker for meeting intelligence & Lithium Defender for spam detection), extending the lifecycle of legacy UCaaS systems and opening new revenue streams (securing ARR from legacy bases).
  • Platform Strategy: Defined unified product vision to consolidate 11 fragmented software versions, reducing technical debt by 85% and enabling faster feature iteration.
  • Technical Roadmap Ownership: Championed infrastructure modernization initiative from Oracle to PostgreSQL, eliminating $2M+ annual licensing costs to reinvest in customer-facing innovation while maintaining 99.9% uptime.
  • Product Discovery: Accelerated time-to-market by 60% by prototyping LLM concepts (Claude Code, Cursor) to validate user value before engineering commitment.
  • Customer Experience: Designed and launched self-service portals with embedded RAG AI agents, which automated release note distribution and deflected support tickets.
  • Cross-Functional Leadership: Operated as the central technical liaison coordinating between engineering, DevOps, commercial, and customer support teams, authoring detailed technical specifications that prioritized API scalability.
  • Moved product versioning from YY.MM to SemVer (Major.Minor.Patch) to better reflect maturity and release cadence.
  • Championed productivity tooling for internal teams — introduced Markdown, LaTeX, Marp; built custom RAG tools to streamline workflows.
  • Set up a self-hosted RAG (Cinnamon/kotaemon) for sales, PS, and support to query internal docs. Later retired it and migrated content to ephor.ai and NotebookLM when those matured.
  • MVP Delivery (Independent Contract): Managed the end-to-end development lifecycle for two MVP products: a Live Shopping application and a Garage Management Portal.
  • Technical Definition (Independent Contract): Defined technical architecture (React.js, Node.js, MongoDB) and translated business requirements into precise API specifications for rapid market entry.
  • Requirement Gathering (Independent Contract): Translated stakeholder needs into user stories and technical requirements, ensuring the final delivery met business goals.

Owned the product lifecycle for a Fintech/RegTech SaaS platform, driving international expansion and compliance.

  • RegTech Strategy & Global Expansion: Led the product roadmap for entering stringent international markets (KSA, UAE), ensuring the platform met complex data sovereignty and cryptographic signing requirements.
  • Platform Scalability: Collaborated with architects to redesign a core high-throughput transaction engine for reconciliation across Banking, Insurance, and E-commerce, supporting a 350% increase in volume.
  • Customer Success & MVP: Built MVP solutions for each industry use-case, personally conducting capability demos for prospective leads and onboarding key accounts for initial User Acceptance Testing (UAT).
  • User Adoption & Growth: Achieved an 80% increase in platform adoption and a 350% increase in web traffic by conducting user research to identify friction points and redesigning the onboarding flow.
  • Cross-Functional Enablement: Reduced internal team ramp-up time by 50% by establishing a structured knowledge framework that aligned Inside Sales, Support, Development, and QA teams.
  • GTM & Sales Enablement: Spearheaded marketing initiatives, lead generation, and conducted technical sales presentations and POC demos, accelerating the enterprise sales cycle.

• New Product Development: Led a zero-to-one digital transformation initiative, validating the concept through pilots and securing 3 enterprise contracts before General Availability (GA).
  • Cloud Solution Design: Collaborated with technical architects to define cloud-based solutions (AWS) that addressed complex business challenges, ensuring technical feasibility matched business goals.
  • Conversion Optimization: Partnered with design and engineering to implement ML-driven user flows, resulting in a 10% increase in conversion rates for client platforms.
  • Presales & Marketing: Led marketing efforts and cross-functional presales activities, delivering tailored sales presentations and technical product demos to secure enterprise contracts.

MBA Internship. CIBI is a pre-incubation program supporting early-stage startup teams.

  • Startup Enablement: Advised and supported a cohort of 15 startup teams in the pre-incubation phase on market analysis, product development, and business strategy. Conducted comprehensive startup assessments, provided sector insights, and developed pitch materials.
  • Workshops & Training: Initiated and conducted educational sessions equipping incubatees with strategic frameworks and methodologies for successful business development.

• Process Automation: Developed and deployed Python/Bash automation scripts that reduced service desk ticket resolution time by 30%, directly improving SLA adherence.
  • Day-to-day: handling tickets, triaging issues, troubleshooting, and routing to appropriate teams.
  • Knowledge Management: Architected a centralized knowledge repository for the team, streamlining daily operations, standardizing edge-case handling, and reducing onboarding time by 40%.

• Open Source Infrastructure Initiative: Initiated and executed a company-wide migration from unlicensed Windows environments to CentOS Linux, LibreOffice, and other OSS. This eliminated legal compliance risk, saved $50k+ in licensing fees, and reduced malware incidents to zero.
  • Performance Leadership: Managed a team of 18 agents, improving Service Level Agreement (SLA) delivery by 35% through rigorous data-driven performance metrics.

• Security Specialization: Diagnosed and removed complex rootkits and ransomware from compromised Windows endpoints, gathering critical threat signature data to refine McAfee's detection algorithms.
  • Performance Excellence: Exceeded performance targets by 120% for a major U.S. credit bureau client, maintaining high customer retention rates.
  • Also handled knowledge base updates and on-the-job training for new joiners.

• Process Engineering: Formalized placement operations by drafting a "constitution" of SOPs.
  • Strategic Initiative: Established the "Corporate Readiness" club to separate training delivery from recruitment operations.

• Project Excellence: Project rated "Excellent" by HAL.
  • Leadership: Founding member and coordinator of the Department Club; organized symposiums and technical summits.

projects.name: Predictive CX Validation Engine
projects.description: Led the development of an enabler tool that leveraged predictive analytics to reduce customer experience hypothesis validation cycles from months to hours, accelerating the product innovation flywheel.

projects.name: AI-Powered Catalog Integrity Platform
projects.description: Architected an AI-first catalog augmentation system that identified and corrected retail defects at scale, functioning as the last line of defense against degraded customer shopping experiences.

projects.name: Global CX Listening & Benchmarking Mechanism
projects.description: Established cross-system listening mechanisms to benchmark customer experience defects against best-in-class standards, converting insights into actionable product roadmap features.

skills.name: Roadmap Strategy and Definition
skills.proofPoint: Successfully owned and drove the 3-year technology roadmap for a retail analytics organization, aligning multi-million dollar investments with long-term business goals.

skills.name: AI-Powered Product Management
skills.proofPoint: Pioneered an AI-first approach to defect intelligence, launching automated predictive solutions that prevented customer experience degradation across global shopping stages.

skills.name: Data-Driven Leadership and Communication
skills.proofPoint: Regularly presented Flash updates, WBRs, and QBRs to senior leadership, demonstrating a data-driven ability to disambiguate complex problem spaces and mitigate cross-system risks.

skills.name: Cross-Functional Stakeholder Management
skills.proofPoint: Liaised with remote global technology and business teams to deliver end-to-end product launches while maintaining high engineering engagement and stakeholder support.

skills.name: Customer Experience Optimization
skills.proofPoint: Identified and sized opportunities for customer experience improvements that directly impacted conversion rates by resolving critical defects across the Amazon flywheel.
